transcript: Speaker A: English seekho ek rupaye mein! English seekho ek rupaye mein! [Learn English for one rupee! Learn English for one rupee!] Speaker B: Arey bhaiya, jhoot kyun bol rahe ho? Koi bhi English coaching class 1500 rupees per month se kam mein English nahi sikhati hai. [Hey brother, why are you lying? No English coaching class teaches English for less than 1500 rupees per month.] Speaker A: Isliye main Arya se English seekhne ki baat kar raha hoon. Ye normal coaching classes se 7x cheaper hai. Aur sirf ek rupaye mein shuru kar sakte ho. [That's why I'm talking about learning English from Arya. This is 7x cheaper than normal coaching classes. And you can start for just one rupee.] Speaker B: Par ye toh AI hai. Kya ye acche se English sikha payegi? [But this is AI. Will it be able to teach English well?] Speaker C: Maine already 50 lakh se zyada logon ko English sikhayi hai, toh tum bhi seekh lo. [I have already taught English to more than 50 lakh people, so you should learn too.] Speaker B: Par mere paas zyada time nahi hai. [But I don't have much time.] Speaker C: Roz mere saath bas 10-15 minute practice karo, aur kuch hi dino mein tumhari English farratedar ho jayegi. [Just practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily, and in just a few days your English will become fluent.] Speaker B: Wow! Toh shuru kahan se karu? [Wow! So where do I start?] Speaker C: Install button par click karo, MySivi app install karo, aur apni 15 days English learning challenge shuru karo. [Click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start your 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker D: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: An old rickshaw driver and an AI robot avatar promote the MySivi app to a young man, highlighting its affordability at just 1 Rupee. The AI robot explains that it has helped over 50 lakh users and requires only 10-15 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app and start a 15-day English learning challenge.
